author: Decent
name: Streamline Settings Viewer
description: Displays streamline-bridge application and DE1 machine settings in Srtreamline Style in an embeddable HTML page. URL:http://localhost:8080/api/v1/plugins/Streamline-settings.reaplugin/ui

RefreshInterval.description: Auto-refresh interval in seconds (0 to disable)

body.description: Returns an HTML page displaying current REA and DE1 settings
